message:
fix(mvcc): reject duplicate 2PC participants and defer state transitions

Add DuplicateDatabase error to catch double-registration of the same
database in a two-phase commit. Fix prepare_participant and
record_wal_index_update to validate the participant exists before
advancing the coordinator state, preventing state corruption when an
unknown database ID is passed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
